## Problem / Motivation

What problem does this feature solve? What's the current pain point?

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Domain / area affected

- [ ] Idea capture (mobile UI)
- [ ] Classification (classifier.py / domains.py)
- [ ] Project creation (project_creator.py)
- [ ] Session launch (session_launcher.py)
- [ ] Authentication (auth.py)
- [ ] New domain definition
- [ ] Other: ___

## Additional context

Add any other context, screenshots, or examples about the feature request here.
